parameters.query:
SELECT COALESCE(
    to_char(MAX(lexware_last_synced_at) AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Berlin',
      'YYYY-MM-DD'),
    '2025-01-01'
  ) as last_sync
  FROM sales_invoices
  WHERE source = 'lexware';

parameters.jsCode: return { json: { status: 'idle', message: 'No updated invoices from Lexware' } };

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO sales_invoices (
  lexware_invoice_id, invoice_number, invoice_type, status,
  invoice_date, due_date, total_net, total_vat, total_gross,
  vat_rate, currency, customer_name, customer_address,
  lexware_contact_id, lexware_last_synced_at, lexware_synced_at,
  lexware_raw_data, lexware_sync_status, source
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.voucher_id }}',
  '{{ $json.voucher_number }}',
  '{{ $json.invoice_type }}'::sales_invoice_type,
  '{{ $json.status }}'::sales_invoice_status,
  '{{ $json.invoice_date }}'::date,
  {{ $json.due_date ? "'" + $json.due_date + "'::date" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.total_net }}, {{ $json.vat_amount }}, {{ $json.total_gross }},
  {{ $json.vat_rate }}, '{{ $json.currency }}',
  '{{ $json.customer_name }}', '{{ $json.customer_address }}',
  {{ $json.lexware_contact_id ? "'" + $json.lexware_contact_id + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  now(), now(),
  '{{ $json.raw_data }}'::jsonb, 'synced', 'lexware'
)
ON CONFLICT (lexware_invoice_id) DO UPDATE SET
  status = EXCLUDED.status, due_date = EXCLUDED.due_date,
  total_net = EXCLUDED.total_net, total_vat = EXCLUDED.total_vat,
  total_gross = EXCLUDED.total_gross,
  customer_name = EXCLUDED.customer_name, customer_address = EXCLUDED.customer_address,
  lexware_contact_id = EXCLUDED.lexware_contact_id,
  lexware_last_synced_at = now(), lexware_synced_at = now(),
  lexware_raw_data = EXCLUDED.lexware_raw_data, lexware_sync_status = 'synced'
RETURNING id, invoice_number, status::text,
  (xmax = 0) as is_new;

-- Auto-match client
WITH match AS (
  SELECT c.id FROM clients c
  WHERE c.company_name ILIKE '%' || '{{ $('Build Upsert Data').item.json.customer_name }}' || '%'
  LIMIT 1
)
UPDATE sales_invoices si SET client_id = match.id
FROM match
WHERE si.id = '{{ $json.id }}'::uuid AND si.client_id IS NULL;

-- Sync log
INSERT INTO lexware_sync_log (sync_direction, entity_type, entity_id, lexware_id, action, sync_status)
VALUES ('pull', 'sales_invoice', '{{ $json.id }}'::uuid,
  '{{ $('Build Upsert Data').item.json.voucher_id }}',
  CASE WHEN {{ $json.is_new }} THEN 'create' ELSE 'update' END,
  'success');

parameters.jsCode:
const items = $input.all();
return { json: { status: 'completed', total: items.length } };

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO lexware_sync_log (sync_direction, entity_type, lexware_id, action, sync_status, error_message)
VALUES ('pull', 'sales_invoice', '{{ $json.voucher_id }}', 'fetch', 'error', 'Detail fetch failed');

SELECT COALESCE(
    to_char(MAX(lexware_last_synced_at) AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Berlin',
      'YYYY-MM-DD'),
    '2025-01-01'
  ) as last_sync
  FROM sales_invoices
  WHERE source = 'lexware';

activeVersion.name: Fix updatedDateFrom format
activeVersion.description: Lexware API expects YYYY-MM-DD, not full ISO timestamp
